recommendations.title: Regret!
recommendations.overview: A David's classmate, Jochem, is harassed by three bullies, but nobody does anything at school, not even David, who feels guilty for not pointing out the culprits.

recommendations.title: The Stepfather
recommendations.overview: Michael Harding returns home from military school to find his mother happily in love and living with her new boyfriend, David. As the two men get to know each other, Michael becomes more and more suspicious of the man who is always there with a helpf

recommendations.title: Subservience
recommendations.overview: With his wife out sick, a struggling father brings home a lifelike AI, only to have his self-aware new help want everything her new family has to offer... Like the affection of her owner and she'll kill to get it.

recommendations.title: The Personal History of David Copperfield
recommendations.overview: A fresh and distinctive take on Charles Dickens’ semi-autobiographical masterpiece, The Personal History of David Copperfield, set in the 1840s, chronicles the life of its iconic title character as he navigates a chaotic world to find his elusive pla

recommendations.title: The Taming of the Shrewd
recommendations.overview: When a heartbroken scientist moves back home to start over, her scheming brother hires a handsome stranger to convince her to sell their land.

recommendations.title: Cria!
recommendations.overview: Ana, an eight-year-old girl living in Madrid with her grandmother and two sisters, mourns the death of her mother.

recommendations.title: Are You There God? It's Me, Margaret.
recommendations.overview: When her family moves from New York City to New Jersey, an 11-year-old girl navigates new friends, feelings, and the beginning of adolescence.

recommendations.title: Painless
recommendations.overview: While searching for a solution to his serious health condition, David, a renowned neurosurgeon, discovers a sinister secret hidden in the past.

recommendations.title: His Three Daughters
recommendations.overview: Emotions run high when three estranged sisters reunite in a cramped New York City apartment to watch over their ailing father during his final days.

recommendations.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
recommendations.overview: Holly Golightly is an eccentric New York City playgirl determined to marry a Brazilian millionaire. But when young writer Paul Varjak moves into her apartment building, her past threatens to get in their way.
